data.label: 腾讯游戏 GCloud
data.description: Tencent GCloud 服务平台是腾讯游戏研发效能部打造的游戏中台，负责聚焦腾讯游戏技术预研和实现，通过提供产品化的服务来提升整体游戏研发效能。

data.label: Tencent Games GCloud
data.description: Tencent GCloud service platform is a game middleware developed by Tencent’s Game R&D Efficiency Department. It focuses on Tencent’s game technology research and implementation, providing productized services to improve overall game development efficiency.
